message:
🌱 Add backstage: TechDocs: Support README.md or docs/README.md to be treated mission (#1045)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "backstage-6057-techdocs-support-readme-md-or-docs-readme-md-to-be-treated-as-doc",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "backstage: TechDocs: Support README.md or docs/README.md to be treated as docs/index.md",
+    "description": "TechDocs: Support README.md or docs/README.md to be treated as docs/index.md. Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current backstage setup",
+        "description": "Verify your backstage version and configuration:\n```bash\nnpx backstage-cli info\n```\nThis feature requires a working backstage installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review backstage configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant backstage configuration:\nA lot of projects have an existing README.md file which serves as an \"index page\" for those exploring the repository on GitHub/GitLab/etc."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for TechDocs: Support README.md or docs/README.md to be treated…",
+        "description": "## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!\n\nIn techdocs, add support for using `README.md` or `docs/README.md` as fallback if `docs/index.md` is missing.\n\nThis closes #6057\n\n#### :heavy_check_mark: Checklist\n```yaml\nconfig[\"markdown_extensions\"].append(\"mdx_truly_sane_lists\")\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"TechDocs: Support README.md or docs/README.md to be treated…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!\n\nIn techdocs, add support for using `README.md` or `docs/README.md` as fallback if `docs/index.md` is missing.\n\nThis closes #6057\n\n#### :heavy_check_mark: Checklist",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "config[\"markdown_extensions\"].append(\"mdx_truly_sane_lists\")",
+        "site_name: 'new-new-service'\nsite_description: 'Main documentation for new-new-service'\nrepo_url: https://gitlab.com/....../new-new-service\nedit_uri: edit/main\n\nplugins:\n  - techdocs-core\n\nnav:\n  - Overview:\n    - What is new-new-service?: 'README.md'",
+        "hooked in `backend/src/plugins/techdocs.ts`:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
